title: Rich British Shirataki Soup
description: Herbal, velvety brunch‑mood British soup featuring shirataki noodles, cashew cream and fresh greens.

ingredients.name: Cashew cream
ingredients.notes: mix soaked cashews with water to thick consistency

instructions: Heat olive oil in a medium saucepan over medium heat.
Add the thyme leaves and sauté for 30 seconds until fragrant.
Pour in the vegetable stock and bring to a gentle boil.
Add the cauliflower florets, frozen peas, kale, and spinach, and simmer for 8 minutes until vegetables are tender.
Stir in the drained shirataki noodles and oat milk, then reduce heat and simmer for another 5 minutes.
Blend half of the soup with an immersion blender until velvety, then return to the pot.
Whisk in the cashew cream until fully integrated and the broth thickens.
Add lemon juice, salt, and pepper, adjusting seasoning to taste.
Ladle the soup into a preheated dolsot stone bowl, ensuring even distribution.
Serve hot, optionally garnished with fresh thyme.
